h3. *Background*

Specification was missed during the internal logic discussion stage.

When Current Info transitions from Operational to Non-operational, the original spec forced the mode to OFF (no Active / Ready / Standby), but the revised spec allows Standby to persist (no Active / Ready).

h3. *AS-IS*

When Current Info changes from the table's Operational values to any Non-operational value, the mode transitions to {color:#de350b}*OFF*{color}
|*Signal*|*Value*|*Description*|*Note*|
|FLAG_A|0x1|VAL1|context one|
| |0x2|VAL2|context two|
|FLAG_B|0x1|MAIN|primary state|
|FLAG_C|0x0, or 0x1|None, or AltExit|state none, or
right after an alt exit|
|FLAG_D|0x0, or 0x1|None, or ExitVal|state none, or right after exit|
|FLAG_E|0x2|Normal|normal operation|
|FLAG_F|0x1|2 or more|more than one active lane|
h3. *TO-BE*

When Current Info changes from the table's Operational values to any Non-operational value, the mode *{color:#4c9aff}Active and Ready are not reachable.{color}*
|*Signal*|*Value*|*Description*|*Note*|
|FLAG_A|0x1|VAL1|context one|
| |0x2|VAL2|context two|
|FLAG_B|0x1|MAIN|primary state|
|FLAG_C|0x0, or 0x1|None, or AltExit|state none, or
right after an alt exit|
|FLAG_D|0x0, or 0x1|None, or ExitVal|state none, or right after exit|
|FLAG_E|0x2|Normal|normal operation|
|FLAG_F|0x1|2 or more|more than one active lane|
h3. *Source*

Internal source

[spec_document_rev1.docx|https://example.com/download/attachments/spec_document_rev1.docx?version=2&api=v2]
h3. *Plan*

Master event: [release_v1 temp4|https://example.com/pages/release-v1]

Application event: all variants

h3. *Impact*

Positive effect: faster transition back to a valid state when conditions allow

Negative effect: risk of a false positive under anomalous input

h3. *Tests*

-
